item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
ParkShelf 1.0.1

  • Tidier parking when a window can’t slide off-screen (for example, on a single display): ParkShelf now hides the window’s app instead of minimizing it to the Dock — a cleaner vanish, with no Dock entry. Restore it from the shelf exactly as before.
  • Because this hides the app, parking one window of a multi-window app tucks its other windows away too; they all come back together when you restore the card.
